programme.title: The Trial
programme.desc: Sub-inspector Rajeev interrogates Roopa regarding her husband's accidental death. Learning that Roopa is also a sub-inspector, he uncovers revelations in the case.

programme.title: The B Side
programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: Love You to the Stars and Back
programme.desc: A girl goes on a road trip to find aliens.

programme.title: Man And Wife
programme.desc: Carding and Luisa are a married couple, torn between their love for each other and issues of their respective families.

programme.title: Born to Love You
programme.desc: Shen Qi, an eighteen-year-old girl, fell in love with a middle-aged man called Fang Jiacheng during an accident. To make his mother happy, Fang Jiacheng asked Shen Qi to pretend to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Ang mga Kaibigan ni Mama Susan
I Have Three Eggs
programme.desc: Cousins Harrison, Sylvester and Arnold attempt to win the love of a woman who has left her child with them.

programme.title: Suspek
programme.desc: A 1999 Filipino movie starring Victor Neri.

programme.title: Tong Tatlong Tatay Kong Pakitong Kitong
programme.desc: An orphaned child is not able to find a home; the priest sends her to Manila to live with three bachelors. She gets in harm's way when the boys accidentally pick up a bag of jewels that belongs to criminals.

programme.title: Mayor Cesar Climaco
programme.desc: Cesar Cortez Climaco struggles with his rise to power as he becomes the mayor of Zamboanga City for 11 years and three non-consecutive terms.

programme.title: Para Sa Hopeless Romantic
programme.desc: A student writer struggles to find a happy ending to her romantic novel after her real-life romance falls apart.

programme.title: Tong Tatlong Tatay Kong Pakitong Kitong
programme.desc: An orphaned child is not able to find a home; the priest sends her to Manila to live with three bachelors. She gets in harm's way when the boys accidentally pick up a bag of jewels that belongs to criminals.

programme.title: Sukob
programme.desc: A Filipino couple working overseas return to their hometown to get married. But a deadly curse follows the couple, based on the superstition that marriage should not take place within a year of the death of an immediate relative.

programme.title: Sakaling maging tayo
programme.desc: Two college freshmen meet on their last day of school and decide to play a game of dares that eventually forces them to confront their issues, leading to the start of a possible romance.

programme.title: Bala ko... Bahala sa 'yo
programme.desc: After being suspended from the police force for botching up a hostage rescue operation, a cop and his assistant decide to take the law into their own hands and exact punishment on a dollar racketing gang. But they face resistance from the underworld.

programme.title: Anghel sa Lupa
programme.desc: A young man, who has passed on in an untimely manner, looks for closure concerning his unfinished business and the loved ones he has left behind. He gets help from another wandering soul and a spirit guide.

programme.title: A.E.I.O.U.
programme.desc: Juan is a policeman who wants to follow in the footsteps of his deceased grandfather. When criminals attack his grandmother and fiancée, he seeks to save the day with the help of five children.

programme.title: Milyonaryong Mini
programme.desc: Berting, a carefree playboy, believes that all the people in his life are after his money. Because of his attitude, Berting's father decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Love Me Again
programme.desc: A woman pushes her three daughters to marry men for their money.

programme.title: Wala ka nang puwang sa mundo
programme.desc: On the day of his parole, Miguel promises to go straight, but desperation drives him to work for his unscrupulous ex-partner.

programme.title: DOTGA: Da One That Ghost Away
programme.desc: Wanting to save her beloved grandmother's house from being sequestered, paranormal expert Carmel and her best friend form a squad of ghost hunters with their misfit buddies.

programme.desc: With Amy Perez and Marc Logan.

programme.title: The Alto Knights

programme.desc: Plagued by dark visions, Dick gets a surprise at the Black Spot. Meanwhile, the kids each face their own challenges.

programme.title: The Image of You
programme.desc: As Anna falls for Nick, her twin Zoe senses a web of deceit, spiraling into a deadly game of truth.

programme.title: Angus, Thongs and Perfect Snogging

programme.desc: A young African-American named Bigger Thomas takes a job working for an affluent Chicago white family – a decision that will change his life forever.

programme.desc: George Clooney is Ryan Bingham, a corporate downsizing expert whose cherished life on the road is threatened.

programme.title: Humane

programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: A girl must use her magic compass to seek children, who are kidnapped in a ploy that would endanger the world.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Back in Action
programme.desc: Brendan Fraser and Jenna Elfman team up with Daffy Duck and friends in the biggest animated adventure ever to hit real life!

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma… one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: My Worst Neighbor
programme.desc: In a house with little soundproofing, a man and a woman living next door started a noise war. They then cohabitate through the wall, and catching up in subtle emotions...

programme.title: Concrete Utopia
programme.desc: Seoul has laid in ruin after an earthquake, leaving one single apartment remains standing. The apartment's resident representative strives to protect residents from outsiders...

programme.title: Toss Coin
programme.desc: A busker met a girl who makes decision through tossing a coin.

programme.title: No Other Choice
programme.desc: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a paper mill manager has no other choice but to turn to violence to eliminate those who stand in the way of his dream life.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep11
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep12
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: A demonstration against urban renewal project leads to death of a police and a teenage boy. The boy's father, who claims he's innocent, was arrested for the cop's death.

programme.title: Race to Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: 6/45: Lucky Lotto
programme.desc: The excitement of winning a lottery ticket doesn’t last long for sergeant Chun-woo as it accidentally ends up crossing the Military Demarcation Line. He must get his act together and find it again!

programme.title: Noryang: Deadly Sea
programme.desc: In the last battle of Yi Sun-Sin in 1598, he fought against the Japanese army and intertwined with the Ming dynasty, bringing the 7-year Japanese invasions of Korea to an end...

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: When an Olympic gold medalist boxer met a young boxer who falls victim to match fixing, he vows to start a boxing team at the school he teaches at and give his student a shot at the nationals.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When sea-dwelling dragons called Divewings start attacking ships near the island, the Rescue Riders have to find out what's making them so upset.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody & Sherman's first show goes off the rails when celebrity-seeking neighbors won't leave; Napoleon throws a temper tantrum to get his own dessert.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody tries to play an Irish jig while trapped in the elevator; Mozart blows his big piano audition and lands everyone in jail.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom orchestrates a “safe” tour of the realms to convince Olivia that the Hidden World is safe for them to explore.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Prince Barty and Princess Julienne, King Julien's needy and dramatic parents, must take over for their son when he's held captive on a pirate ship

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: As Mort and Clover search for their leader, King Julien shows off his pirate booty moves and convinces the pirates he should be captain of the ship.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss stumbles upon the legendary hidden city of San Lorenzo, and soon finds himself forced to protect it from thieves.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss accidentally gives the orphans a magic substance that will ultimately make them explode. The only cure is guarded by a Sphinx who challenges Puss with riddles - and contrary to his own belief, Puss is not good at riddles.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Fishlegs discovers a hidden civilization of Albino Night Terrors beneath Dragon's Edge, he must craft an escape plan after they attack the Riders.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Eep wants alone time with her new friend Dawn, Guy seeks a new friend of his own and finds an unlikely companion in Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When the Bettermans invite the Croods to join their family game night, two things become clear: Phil needs to win and Grug hates to lose.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The world’s worst baby is on the loose and Boss Baby, Tim and the team must find him before he turns the whole neighborhood against babies

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Templetons head to a new family restaurant only to run into Bootsy Calico!

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Moving to an exotic new home, an adventurous teenager meets a new group of kids and discovers a dragon in the fissure.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom forges a friendship with the dragon and discovers an entire world of dragons within the fissure.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun encounter unexpected dangers and are separated while exploring the Hidden Realm of dragons. Tom introduces Jun to the dragon world, and Jun bonds with a dragon of her own – Wu and Wei.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty, Revvit and the crew save a band of Woodland Reptools from an evil and destructive Sawmetradon named Splitter who refuses to join the Trux team.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Fang Decay Why is Thatch acting meaner than usual? He has a fang-ache! Scare Day Mantha is determined to become the first zombie ever to win the Super Boo?Scare School's ultimate scaring competition.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Disarmed and Dangerous When Mantha's arm falls off, her replacement limb turns out to be a monstrous tentacle! Frankenleftovers Casper gets a seemingly impossible class assignment—to create life!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and his friends chase all over Nutwood when Ping Pong's spell accidentaly makes his scooter run away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Undersea adventures when Rupert, Bill and Ping Pong have to rescue Miranda the Mermaid from the clutches of a Giant Clam.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.desc: Based on webtoon, the series follows a woman who goes on a blind date, meets two charming guys, and navigates her feelings to discover true love.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie
programme.desc: Elmer Bernstein's score highlights this story of two women who arrive in 1920s New York searching for work and romance.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: The Changeling (1980)
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Revolves around Frank, an American tourist visiting Italy to mend a broken heart. Elise is an extraordinary woman who deliberately crosses his path.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time of darkness and in the face of evil, one man dared to fight back. Utilising his combat skills as an assassin, a warrior defies an empire to become a legend and unite a nation.

programme.title: Anatomy of a Murder
programme.desc: The truth proves elusive for a former prosecutor who is enlisted to defend an Army officer accused of murdering his wife's rapist.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Know more about forces that change the shape, size or movement of objects and how light, heat and sound travel using various media.

programme.title: Grade 7 Filipino
programme.desc: Maliwanagan kung ano ang suprasegmental, pagbubuod, pagsusuri at paghahambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, at kung paano gamitin ang angkop na pahayag at panadang anaporik at kataporik na pangngalan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of geometry of shapes and sizes, and geometric relationships.

programme.title: Grade 7 English
programme.desc: Learn how to use multimedia resources and oral language when giving information, and how to express one's belief, cite evidence, and reign in thoughts in public forums.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 10 我们回家吧 (第三季)

programme.title: Papa Pilot

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 9
programme.desc: Asri is falsely accused of embezzling funds by his ex employer at One Up Agency. He is remanded and tries to seek Hani's help to bail him out. While Herzy and Ema keep Asri's predicament a secret from the rest at Raja Bundle, Zafrul blatantly reveals to Amirul about Asri.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 10
programme.desc: Asri is determined not to let the setbacks befall him lately to affect Raja Bundle. Asri comes up with a new marketing and business plan for his HBB sellers. However, Kak Sal became increasingly suspicious when the police came to seize Asri's business accounts. Amirul urges Hani to accept Zafrul's proposal. Asri is confident he knows the identity of the culprit who had framed him for embezzlement. Asri confronts the perpetrator.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 11
programme.desc: Due to online trolls, Asri and his team must deal with the allegations against him which have now affected his sales. As he tries to find solutions, Asri is beset by more problems as Kak Sal and Ema both have differing issues that come to the fore.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 12
programme.desc: Asri is focused on getting things ready for his big online battle with Madi Lambung as he ensures that every detail is covered. Things also become clearer for Hani, Kak Cik and Ema with regards to their own wants and needs to move forward.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 13

Hani begins to accept Zafrul's presence in her life when she sees Amirul's excitement in the wedding. Time is running out for Asri to prove his innocence and so will be Raja Bundle's.

programme.title: Anak Ayah
